content.text: Question #3In the solution to the prior quiz question, why doesgetFraction()return by value instead of by reference?Show SolutionBecause ourtempFraction is a local variable, it will go out of scope at the end of the function. If we were to returntempas reference, we’d return a dangling reference back to the caller.Next lesson13.11Struct miscellanyBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson13.9Default member initialization

Show SolutionBecause ourtempFraction is a local variable, it will go out of scope at the end of the function. If we were to returntempas reference, we’d return a dangling reference back to the caller.Next lesson13.11Struct miscellanyBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson13.9Default member initialization
Because ourtempFraction is a local variable, it will go out of scope at the end of the function. If we were to returntempas reference, we’d return a dangling reference back to the caller.
